title: Greedy Strategy: Intuition
content_preview: Explanation of greedy strategy intuition with the problem of maximizing salary by selecting digits to form the largest number. Examples include arranging digits for salary and coin change problem with

title: Greedy Strategy: General Structure
content_preview: Pseudocode for general greedy algorithm structure: getOptimal(A, n) with initialization, loop to select item, feasibility check, and return result.

title: The Knapsack Problem
content_preview: Description of the 0/1 Knapsack Problem with input, output, and example with items, weights, values, and capacity W=16. Includes brute force enumeration of subsets, total weight and value calculations

title: Fractional Knapsack Problem
content_preview: Explanation of 0/1 vs Fractional Knapsack. Algorithm for Fractional Knapsack: sort by value/weight ratio, take items greedily until capacity is filled, including fractional part of the last item. Exam

title: Conclusion
content_preview: Summary that brute force algorithms are inefficient, with notes on exponential time. Includes review questions, pseudocode for algorithms like Dijkstra's, Prim's, and some project announcements. Reite
